width.description: CSS width value applied as an inline style on the skeleton block (e.g. `'200px'`, `'100%'`).

height.description: CSS height value applied as an inline style on the skeleton block (e.g. `'1rem'`, `'48px'`).

radius.description: CSS border-radius value applied as an inline style, overriding the default pill shape (e.g. `'4px'`, `'50%'`).

class.description: Additional class merged onto the `.cinder-skeleton` root element.
